name: Shahnawaz Mohammed
title: Senior Software Engineer · Technical Architect · Drupal Specialist
tagline: Senior Software Engineer and Technical Architect with fourteen years delivering enterprise-grade web platforms across federal, state, healthcare, and financial sectors.
summary: Senior Software Engineer, Technical Architect, and Drupal Specialist with 14+ years of hands-on experience designing, developing, architecting, and supporting enterprise-scale content management and web application platforms.
Deep Drupal expertise across Drupal 6 through 11 — custom module development, theming, site building, migrations, performance tuning, security hardening, and production support.

Proven full-stack engineer: PHP 5.x–8.4 with Symfony and Laravel on the backend; React, Angular 9–18, Node.js, TypeScript, and Next.js on the frontend; decoupled and headless Drupal architectures with REST and GraphQL.
Extensive Identity, Security & API experience — SSO/IAM with Okta, SimpleSAMLphp, OAuth 2.0, OpenID Connect, SAML 2.0; API development and testing with Postman and BrowserStack.
Cloud and DevOps on Microsoft Azure (certified), AWS, Acquia Cloud, and Pantheon — with Docker, Kubernetes, Jenkins, Azure DevOps, GitLab, and GitHub Actions.
Served as Software Engineer, Senior Developer, Technical Lead, Solution Architect, Release Manager, and Project Manager.

Cloud: AWS (EC2, S3, SQS, Lambda, RDS, ECS)

experience.role: Tech Lead Web Developer / Systems Engineering
highlights: Leads hands-on development on the Enterprise Privacy Policy Engine (EPPE) — a complex, custom, high-traffic Drupal 10 portal supporting Medicaid operations.
Implemented RBAC workflows, media-dispositioning, custom dashboards, dialog forms, and interactive workflow screens.
Redesigned EPPE global features: PDF generation, advanced search, filtering, cron-based automated DUA-policy notifications.
Oversees AWS-based deployments with Kubernetes containerization; Docker/DDEV local dev; Jenkins pipelines; tag-based releases.
Coordinates zero-downtime UAT and production deployments; mentors juniors and leads cross-functional teams on Drupal and architectural best practices.

experience.company: State of New York — Department of Corrections (NYDOCCS)
experience.role: Tech Lead Web Developer / Systems Engineering
highlights: Directed migration of legacy portal components to Drupal 9 on Acquia Cloud.
Instituted unit, functional, and regression testing frameworks for production-ready releases.
Enforced RBAC, authorization workflows, and state/federal compliance.
Owned end-to-end CI/CD on Acquia Cloud and Git workflows across DEV, QA, UAT, PROD.
Mentored juniors on Drupal best practices, multi-site management, and modular component development.

experience.role: Tech Lead Web Developer / Systems Engineering
highlights: Led migration of multiple legacy PHP portals (Register-to-Vote, eDocs, Worker Payroll, Affidavit, User Management, ROV Intranet) from NGINX to IIS.
Reverse-engineered legacy PHP into .NET Core 6 and upgraded to latest .NET Core LTS.
Modularized monoliths into standalone services or Global API-first microservices.
Set up Azure Dev/Test/UAT/Prod environments from scratch with Azure Pipelines and CI/CD automation.
Led full Azure DevOps integration — pipeline creation, build/release config, automated testing, deployment tracking.

experience.role: Tech Lead Web Developer / Systems Engineering
highlights: Led migration of the Governor's legacy Drupal 7 portal (2009 build) to Drupal 9 on Acquia Cloud.
Major contributor to the Universal Navigation (UNAV) project — ~8,000 subdomains across NY state portals including DOT, DMV, and CSEA.
Implemented multi-language translation across legacy and new systems for accessibility and localization.
Managed DEV → QA → UAT → PROD promotion, rollback planning, and post-deployment validation.
Mentored a team of 12 developers on Drupal 9, multi-site, and Acquia workflows; ensured WCAG 2.1 compliance.

experience.role: Tech Lead Web Developer / Systems Engineering
highlights: Architected enterprise Drupal 9 & 10 applications with custom modules, themes, admin views, RESTful services, and third-party integrations.
Containerized Drupal 9 & 10 with Docker; executed migrations 7 → 8 → 9 → 10 on Acquia Cloud.
Acted as Release Manager — end-to-end release cycles across DEV, QA, UAT, PROD, CAB approvals, rollback.
Designed partially decoupled Drupal + React SPAs; SSR dashboards for CFO stakeholders using Node.js, TypeScript, and GraphQL.
Led performance work that reduced page load time ~25% via DB partitioning and caching.
Served as Accessibility SME ensuring ADA and WCAG 2.1 compliance across sites, PDFs, Word, and PowerPoint.

Built React and Angular UI components integrated with PHP/Drupal backends using REST and GraphQL.

Led Drupal 6 → 7 → 8 upgrades, content migration, module/theme development, security patching.
Built custom responsive React frontends (Forms, Events, Router, Animations, Flux).
Managed a 35-member onsite/offshore cross-functional team including Salesforce and Marketo specialists.
Championed ADA/WCAG 2.1; delivered accessibility training to 50+ developers and content editors — 100% compliance for new content.
